{{Infobox artifact
| name = Goldsteel
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Goldsteel Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Goldsteel is a rare and valuable metallic substance characterized by its appearance as polished gold that reflects a pure [[white light]] when it catches the sun, creating a visual sensation that makes its true color difficult for the mind to identify. Unlike [[halfsilver]], which disrupts [[madra]], goldsteel possesses the unique ability to provide a firm grip on virtually any type of [[madra]] and can prevent it from passing through the material. This property makes goldsteel essential for [[Soulsmith tools]], such as scalpels, tongs, and hooks, which are used to manipulate immaterial [[Remnant]] parts without damaging them or passing through the subject. It is also utilized in the creation of high-quality defensive equipment, including breastplates, mail, shields, and armor plates designed to restrain excess power. Additionally, goldsteel is used in specialized applications like [[scripted chains]] and various trinkets intended to ward off spirits or protect combatants against [[Remnants]].}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Goldsteel]] is a primary mineral output from the mines of [[Mount Venture]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c12">''Unsouled'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Goldsteel]] reflects pure [[white light]] and provides protection against [[Remnants]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c14">''Unsouled'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Some types of [[madra]] can only be manipulated by [[Goldsteel{{!}}goldsteel]] tools.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c12">''Soulsmith'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Goldsteel]] is a unique substance that can get a firm grip on virtually any kind of [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1">''Blackflame'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Goldsteel]] is an exotic metal used in [[Soulsmith tools]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Goldsteel]] is required to manipulate [[Remnant]] parts.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7">''Skysworn'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[madra{{!}}Madra]] cannot pass through [[Goldsteel{{!}}goldsteel]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Fisher Gesha]] has a hooked blade of gleaming [[Goldsteel{{!}}goldsteel]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Goldsteel]] is resistant to various types of [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] rested his fingers on the [[Goldsteel{{!}}goldsteel]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
